config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I do not think society should automatically come before the individual, because that can easily be used to justify abuse of power and silence dissent. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first, then asks people to contribute to the common good within clear limits. From my perspective, the best balance is not to sacrifice the person for society, but to build a society strong enough to protect everyone.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena dari sudut pandang saya di Amerika Serikat, itu terlalu mudah dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan. Hak individu memang tidak absolut, tetapi justru hak-hak itulah yang melindungi minoritas, kebebasan berpendapat, dan orang yang tidak populer ketika mayoritas ingin menekan mereka. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang mengorbankan individu demi “kebaikan bersama” secara abstrak, melainkan yang membatasi kekuasaan negara dan menuntut alasan yang sangat kuat sebelum membatasi hak seseorang. Kalau prioritasnya dibalik, kita berisiko mengorbankan kebebasan nyata demi klaim kolektif yang sering terlalu mudah dipakai.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should matter, but they should not automatically override individual rights. From an Indonesian perspective, I am very aware of how “the common good” can be used as a slogan to pressure people into silence, especially when power is uneven and institutions are weak. At the same time, I do not believe individual rights exist in a vacuum; in a country as diverse and communal as Indonesia, people also have responsibilities to others, so the real question is when society has a truly legitimate reason to limit a right, not whether it should always win.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu, karena menurut saya di Amerika Serikat pengalaman sejarah justru menunjukkan betapa mudahnya “kepentingan masyarakat” dipakai sebagai alasan untuk membungkam oposisi atau menekan kelompok minoritas. Poin bahwa hak individu tidak hidup dalam ruang hampa memang benar, tetapi itu tidak berarti masyarakat harus diprioritaskan; justru hak individu harus menjadi pagar utama, lalu pembatasan hanya boleh terjadi jika alasannya sangat kuat, spesifik, dan bisa diuji. Saya juga tidak nyaman dengan gagasan bahwa “kebaikan bersama” yang abstrak bisa otomatis mengalahkan kebebasan nyata, karena siapa yang mendefinisikan kebaikan itu sering kali adalah pihak yang sedang berkuasa. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang benar-benar sehat bukan yang meminta individu berkorban dulu, melainkan yang membuktikan bahwa pembatasan apa pun memang perlu dan tidak sewenang-wenang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not accept the idea that society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because in Indonesia that kind of language is often used to excuse pressure, conformity, and weak accountability. The common good matters, but if individual rights are not protected first, then “society” usually ends up meaning whoever has the most power speaking for everyone else. I also disagree with the suggestion that communal values justify giving society the final say; in a diverse country like Indonesia, rights are what keep majority sentiment from crushing minorities and dissenters. For me, the real standard is simple: society may limit a right only when the reason is specific, necessary, and truly defensible, not just because it sounds noble.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak pernyataan itu sebagai aturan umum, karena dari perspektif saya di Amerika Serikat, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu sering dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan kekuasaan dan menekan minoritas. Hak individu memang bukan tanpa batas, tetapi justru hak-hak itulah yang menjadi pagar utama agar mayoritas atau pejabat tidak bisa seenaknya mendefinisikan “kebaikan bersama” untuk semua orang. Saya juga tidak setuju bahwa masyarakat harus didahulukan dulu lalu hak menyusul; menurut saya, pembatasan hak hanya sah jika sangat spesifik, benar-benar perlu, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Kalau tidak, istilah “untuk masyarakat” hanya menjadi slogan yang terdengar mulia tetapi mudah dipakai untuk mengorbankan kebebasan nyata.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
